Bash(python << 'EOF'
from ultralytics import YOLO
import torch
print\(f"Torch version: {torch.__version__}"\)
import ultralytics
print\(f"Ultralytics version: {ultralytics.__version__}"\)

# Try to download and load model
try:
    print\("Downloading yolov11n..."\)
    model = YOLO.from_pretrained\(model='yolov11n', task='detect'\)
    print\("Model loaded successfully"\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"Error: {e}"\)
    # Alternative: use pretrained\(\)
    try:
        print\("Trying alternative download method..."\)
        model = YOLO\('yolov11n.pt'\)
    except Exception as e2:
        print\(f"Also failed: {e2}"\)
EOF)

Bash(python << 'EOF'
import urllib.request
import os

model_url = "https://github.com/ultralytics/assets/releases/download/v8.2.0/yolov11n.pt"
model_path = "yolov11n.pt"

if not os.path.exists\(model_path\):
    print\(f"Downloading {model_url}..."\)
    try:
        urllib.request.urlretrieve\(model_url, model_path\)
        print\(f"Downloaded to {model_path}"\)
        print\(f"File size: {os.path.getsize\(model_path\)} bytes"\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f"Error downloading: {e}"\)
else:
    print\(f"{model_path} already exists"\)
EOF)

Bash(python << 'EOF'
import urllib.request
import os

# Try correct URL from Ultralytics releases
model_url = "https://github.com/ultralytics/assets/releases/download/v8.1.0/yolov11n.pt"
model_path = "yolov11n.pt"

if not os.path.exists\(model_path\):
    print\(f"Downloading {model_url}..."\)
    try:
        urllib.request.urlretrieve\(model_url, model_path\)
        print\(f"Downloaded to {model_path}"\)
        print\(f"File size: {os.path.getsize\(model_path\)} bytes"\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f"Error downloading from {model_url}: {e}"\)
        # Try alternate URL
        model_url2 = "https://github.com/ultralytics/assets/releases/download/v0.0.0/yolov11n.pt"
        print\(f"Trying alternate URL: {model_url2}"\)
        try:
            urllib.request.urlretrieve\(model_url2, model_path\)
            print\(f"Downloaded from alternate URL"\)
        except Exception as e2:
            print\(f"Also failed: {e2}"\)
else:
    print\(f"{model_path} already exists"\)
EOF)

Bash(python << 'EOF'
import torch
print\(f"CUDA Available: {torch.cuda.is_available\(\)}"\)
print\(f"CUDA Version: {torch.version.cuda}"\)
print\(f"Device Count: {torch.cuda.device_count\(\)}"\)
if torch.cuda.is_available\(\):
    for i in range\(torch.cuda.device_count\(\)\):
        print\(f"Device {i}: {torch.cuda.get_device_name\(i\)}"\)
        props = torch.cuda.get_device_properties\(i\)
        print\(f"  Memory: {props.total_memory / 1e9:.2f} GB"\)
else:
    print\("CUDA not available - checking NVIDIA drivers..."\)
    import subprocess
    try:
        result = subprocess.run\(['nvidia-smi'], capture_output=True, text=True\)
        print\(result.stdout[:500]\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f"nvidia-smi not found: {e}"\)
EOF)
